Title: Colleen has tried to call a Nevada number 702.727.6861 from her desktop phone and the App and gets a recording stating ‘Destination is not available, not registered or no routes available.’
Notes:
We’ve completed several troubleshooting steps on our end to isolate the issue with calling the Nevada number (702-727-6861).
Verified that outbound calling is working normally by testing other external numbers
Updated outbound dialing rules for both 10-digit and 11-digit formats
Reviewed and corrected extension and SIP trunk assignments
Aligned outbound caller ID (DID) with the appropriate configuration
Retested the call after each change
Despite these adjustments, the issue persists only for this specific number. We also tested the same number from another 3CX system, and the call went through successfully, which confirms that the number itself is valid.
Based on this, the issue appears to be related to routing on the SIP provider side for this specific destination. We are proceeding to engage the provider with call details to resolve this.
